'''tamongo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cnidoband|cnidoband]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-m-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cnidoband|cnidoband]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| tamongo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæmengeth|tæmengeth]] || [[word:tæmengej|tæmengej]] || [[word:tæmengesh|tæmengesh]] || [[word:tæmenge|tæmenge]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tamomongoth|tamomongoth]] || [[word:tamomongoj|tamomongoj]] || [[word:tamomongosh|tamomongosh]] || [[word:tamomongo|tamomongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tamongoth|tamongoth]] || [[word:tamongoj|tamongoj]] || [[word:tamongosh|tamongosh]] || [[word:tamongo|tamongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tamofngoth|tamofngoth]] || [[word:tamofngoj|tamofngoj]] || [[word:tamofngosh|tamofngosh]] || [[word:tamofngof|tamofngof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tamongotho|tamongotho]] || [[word:tamongojo|tamongojo]] || [[word:tamongosho|tamongosho]] || [[word:tamongoko|tamongoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tamongoth|tamongoth]] || [[word:tamongoj|tamongoj]] || [[word:tamongosh|tamongosh]] || [[word:tamongo|tamongo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tamongothol|tamongothol]] || [[word:tamongojol|tamongojol]] || [[word:tamongoshol|tamongoshol]] || [[word:tamongokol|tamongokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tamongothotho|tamongothotho]] || [[word:tamongojojo|tamongojojo]] || [[word:tamongoshosho|tamongoshosho]] || [[word:tamongoko|tamongoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tamongothon|tamongothon]] || [[word:tamongojon|tamongojon]] || [[word:tamongoshon|tamongoshon]] || [[word:tamongokon|tamongokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tamongothoro|tamongothoro]] || [[word:tamongojoro|tamongojoro]] || [[word:tamongoshoro|tamongoshoro]] || [[word:tamongokoro|tamongokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
